title: Limitless
starring: Rami Malek, Jenna Ortega, Jesse Eisenberg
summary: In a sequel to Training Day [Rob's Version], obsessive hacker Noah Way tracks Don to Monaco after discovering impossible digital anomalies that suggest Ava's destroyed system still exists. When Noah is framed for the murder of a government auditor, he teams up with a newly released Ava to prove the evidence has been edited, only for their attempt to expose the truth to risk bringing the programme back for good.
